title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services:
Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services!
